message:
🌱 Add opencost: Support for k8s 1.25 mission (#1413)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,81 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "opencost-1440-support-for-k8s-1-25",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "opencost: Support for k8s 1.25",
+    "description": "Support for k8s 1.25. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current opencost deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your opencost version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n opencost -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opencost\nhelm list -n opencost 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working opencost installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review opencost configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant opencost configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n opencost -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opencost\nkubectl get configmap -n opencost -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=opencost\n```\nOpencost is broken in k8s 1.25. Need to move from v2beta1 to v2\n\n```\nThe Beta API version (autoscaling/v2beta1) of HorizontalPodAutoscaler is no longer served as of version 1.25. This API was deprecated in version 1.23."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Support for k8s 1.25",
+        "description": "## What does this PR change?\n* Updates dependencies and K8s API references to support K8s v1.25\n\nTHIS IS WIP: Need to test further, especially on earlier K8s versions.\n\n## How will this PR impact users?\n* Support added for K8s v1.25 clusters.\n\n## Does this PR address any GitHub or Zendesk issues?\n*\n```yaml\n- image: quay.io/kubecost1/kubecost-cost-model:latest\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade opencost to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade opencost:\n```bash\nhelm repo update\nhelm upgrade opencost opencost/opencost --namespace opencost\n```\nVerify the upgrade:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n opencost\nhelm list -n opencost\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n opencost -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opencost\nkubectl get events -n opencost --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Support for k8s 1.25\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "## What does this PR change?\n* Updates dependencies and K8s API references to support K8s v1.25\n\nTHIS IS WIP: Need to test further, especially on earlier K8s versions.\n\n## How will this PR impact users?\n* Support added for K8s v1.25 clusters.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "- image: quay.io/kubecost1/kubecost-cost-model:latest"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "opencost",
+      "incubating",
+      "observability",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "opencost"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Horizontalpodautoscaler"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "incubating",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/opencost/opencost/issues/1440",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/opencost/opencost",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/opencost/opencost/pull/1447"
+    },
+    "reactions": 2,
+    "comments": 12,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with opencost installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-18T06:36:05.117Z",
